tnSourceDiscovery.source: Tennessee ABC public information and forms
tnSourceDiscovery.summary: Tennessee ABC official public surfaces expose public information/forms and license lists for a private retail market. Treat official pages as source-discovery/license intelligence only; retailer CityHive/e-commerce rows may separately qualify as caveated store inventory.

tnSourceDiscovery.source: Tennessee ABC public information and forms
tnSourceDiscovery.summary: Tennessee ABC publishes public information/forms and license-list PDFs including wholesalers, direct shippers, delivery services, and related regulated entities. This is useful market-source infrastructure, not bottle availability.
Tennessee ABC official pages are licensing, public information, and regulatory guidance for a private retail market; no official bottle/store availability feed found.

southeastReadiness.caveat: Southeast readiness distinguishes live inventory from shipment/release leads and catalog/license context. Non-inventory sources must not be presented as exact bottle/store availability.

ncBoardIntelligence.sourcePolicy: Official/public online sources only. No community sightings, rumors, secondary forums, or user-submitted reports.
